system.range: Personal (1m × Psy Rating for ally warnings)
system.description:
The psyker explores multiple future outcomes in less than a heartbeat. On a successful Focus Power Test, gains +10 to all WS and BS Tests; BS Tests against him suffer –20. Lasts one Round unless sustained. Can warn comrades within 1m × Psy Rating — BS attacks against those warned suffer –5. Cannot be used at Fettered Psychic Strength.

Focus Power Test: Psyniscience

Prerequisites: Divining the Future

XP Cost: 200
